scripts.build-static: xcopy "typescript\photoshopFunctions.js" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\windows.js" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\removeModels.js" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\unsmartlayer.js" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\splitter.js" "scripts" /Y && xcopy "typescript\splitterUtils.js" "scripts" && xcopy "typescript\styleImageAction.js" "scripts" && xcopy "typescript\sketchImageAction.js" "scripts" && xcopy "typescript\removeBackgroundAction.js" "scripts" /Y
scripts.build: if exist "scripts" ( rmdir /s/q "scripts" ) && md "scripts" && tsc --build && npm run build-static
